title: PM Lane 178 - Local Field Readiness Checklist Grouping
authority: repo technical authority; PM lane implementation authority; final integration authority
objective: Reduce Project Miner Temp Power field-readiness scan burden by grouping the existing Local Field Readiness Checklist without changing checklist state, candidate-scoped browser storage, export inclusion, clear behavior, disclosure behavior, or field-authorization/write boundaries.
scope: Grouped the existing Local Field Readiness Checklist into Source and Scope Readiness, Site Access and Safety Readiness, Crew Material and Staging Readiness, and Customer Constraints and Authority Boundary.

Preserved the same eight checklist labels/details, checkbox behavior, candidate-scoped browser storage key, clear button behavior, export inclusion, disclosure behavior, no-disclosure-storage posture, and no-field-authorization/no-write language.
Kept the Local Field Readiness Checklist disclosure behavior stateless with no field-readiness disclosure localStorage key.
Used a read-only sidecar to verify the grouping shape and smoke hardening while VS Code Codex retained PM implementation and final integration authority.
guardrails: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares product action.
No approval POST or approval-row creation.

No field authorization, assignment, schedule/status, durable field record, production tracking, customer report, completion evidence, billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance-system write.
No new export action, export handler, filename, payload version, localStorage key, backend route, service/auth/ingress change, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.
validation: rg -n "PM Lane 178|Local field readiness checklist groups|Source and Scope Readiness field readiness group|Site Access and Safety Readiness field readiness group|Crew Material and Staging Readiness field readiness group|Customer Constraints and Authority Boundary field readiness group|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS - operations-web typecheck passed; focused Playwright pm import-intake smoke passed; operations-web build passed; packet JSON parsed; PM Lane 178 guardrail rg passed; git diff --check passed with only expected CRLF warnings on touched and unrelated markdown files.
sidecar_result: Read-only sidecar Linnaeus recommended the four wrapper-only groups used here, with exact ARIA labels and smoke assertions for group visibility, 2/2/2/2 item distribution, no disclosure storage, preserved checklist behavior, no field authorization, and mutationRequests length 0.
